response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify three main segments: a band performance (00:00-00:26), an escape room scenario with Kaela Kovalskia (00:26-02:11), and a musical performance (02:11-04:59). 2. Performed web searches for the musical performance and song 'Matahari Terbenam' but could not find exact official lyrics, so transcribed the lyrics from the audio. 3. Identified the performer as Kaela Kovalskia (Hololive Indonesia). 4. Constructed the final JSON with all required fields.
response.global_summary: A video starting with an instrumental band performance, followed by Kaela Kovalskia (Hololive Indonesia) in an escape room setting, and ending with a vocal music performance of the song 'Matahari Terbenam' featuring Hololive Indonesia members.

scenes.description: A group of Hololive Indonesia characters perform as an animated band on stage.
Kaela Kovalskia explores an escape room, finding a clue about coffee.
A music video performance featuring Hololive Indonesia characters, with Kaela Kovalskia as the lead vocalist performing the song 'Matahari Terbenam'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Matahari terbenam
Beri semangat baru untuk jiwaku
Beri kijalan menutup hidupku
Ini ku bertahan
Aku pasti bisa menikmati semua dan menghadapinya
Aku yakin pasti bisa
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: The sun sets, giving new spirit to my soul, giving me a path to close my life. I endure this... I can surely do it, enjoying everything and facing it. I am sure... I can surely do it...
